tasks.name: Add the highest-rated ergonomic office chair under $250 to the cart
tasks.description: Find ergonomic office chairs, filter to models under $250 with at least 4-star ratings, sort by rating, and add the highest-rated chair in black color with quantity 1 to the cart.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation menu, hover over the 'Furniture' section and click on 'Office Chairs'.
In the filters sidebar, check the 'Ergonomic' chair type checkbox.
Use the price range filter to set the maximum price to 250 (enter '250' in the max price field).
Use the rating filter to select only products with a minimum rating of 4 stars.
Open the sort dropdown above the product list and select 'Rating - High to Low'.
Click on the first product card in the sorted results list (the highest-rated ergonomic chair under $250).
On the product detail page, open the color dropdown and select 'Black'.
In the quantity field, enter '1' as the quantity.
Click the 'Add to cart' button on the product page.

tasks.name: Request a quote for the cheapest color laser printer with duplex and Wi-Fi under $400
tasks.description: Search for color laser printers, filter to models with duplex printing and Wi-Fi under $400, choose the cheapest result, and submit a quote request for quantity 3 using the on-site form.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the search bar in the header.
Type 'color laser printer' into the search field and press Enter.
Use the price filter on the search results page to set the maximum price to 400 (enter '400' in the max price field).
In the filter options, select 'Laser' as the printer type, check the 'Color printing' option, and enable feature checkboxes for 'Duplex printing' and 'Wi-Fi connectivity'.
Open the sort menu above the results and select 'Price - Low to High'.
Click on the first product card in the sorted list (the cheapest color laser printer with duplex and Wi-Fi under $400).
On the product detail page, click the 'Request a quote' button.
In the quote request form, enter 'Alex Smith' in the Name field, 'Acme Corp' in the Company field, 'alex.smith@example.com' in the Email field, and '3' in the Quantity field.
Click the 'Submit quote request' button at the bottom of the form.

tasks.name: Create a cart with exactly 3 different A4 paper products, each priced between $5 and $20
tasks.description: Navigate to the paper section, filter to A4 paper between $5 and $20, and add the first three distinct products to the cart with quantity 4 each, so the cart contains exactly 3 different A4 paper items.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, hover over 'Office Supplies' and click on 'Paper & Media'.
In the filters sidebar, set the paper size filter to 'A4'.
Use the price range controls to set a minimum price of 5 and maximum price of 20 (enter '5' and '20' in the min and max price fields).
Above the results, open the sort dropdown and select 'Price - Low to High'.
Click on the first A4 paper product card, set the quantity field to '4', and click the 'Add to cart' button.
Return to the A4 paper results list (using the back button or breadcrumb), click on the second product card, set the quantity field to '4', and click 'Add to cart'.
Return again to the A4 paper results list, click on the third product card, set the quantity field to '4', and click 'Add to cart'.
Click on the cart icon in the header to open the cart page.

tasks.name: Save a docking station compatible with 'ProBook 450' to the saved items list
tasks.description: Search for docking stations, filter by compatibility with 'ProBook 450', pick the first compatible docking station in black, and add it to the saved items (wishlist) section.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
Click on the search bar in the header.
Type 'ProBook 450 docking station' into the search field and press Enter.
In the filters, locate the 'Compatibility' section and select the checkbox for 'ProBook 450'.
From the filtered results, click on the first product card in the list.
On the docking station product page, open the color dropdown and choose 'Black' if multiple color options are available.
Click the 'Add to saved items' or 'Add to wishlist' button on the product page.
Use the header menu to click on the 'Saved items' or 'Wishlist' icon/link to open the saved items page.

tasks.name: Compare 27-inch monitors under $350 and add the one with the highest resolution (quantity 2) to the cart
tasks.description: Go to the monitors category, filter to 27-inch models under $350, select the first two for comparison, choose the one with the higher resolution, and add 2 units of that monitor to the cart with standard shipping.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, hover over 'Electronics' and click on 'Monitors'.
In the filters sidebar, set the screen size filter to '27 inches'.
Use the price filter to set the maximum price to 350 (enter '350' in the max price field).
In the product list, check the 'Compare' checkbox for the first and second monitor products displayed.
Click the 'Compare' button or link that appears (often at the top or bottom of the list) to open the compare view for the selected monitors.
On the comparison page, locate the 'Resolution' row and click on the product name of the monitor that shows the higher resolution value.
On the chosen monitor’s product page, enter '2' into the quantity field.
In the shipping options section, select the 'Standard shipping (3–5 business days)' radio button.
Click the 'Add to cart' button to add 2 units of this monitor to the cart.

tasks.name: Add two different eco-certified cleaning products with free shipping and 4+ stars to the cart
tasks.description: Open the cleaning supplies category, filter to eco-certified products that offer free shipping and have at least 4-star ratings, then add the first and second products from the list to the cart with specific quantities.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, hover over 'Facilities' and click on 'Cleaning Supplies'.
In the filters sidebar, enable the 'Eco-certified' or 'Environmentally friendly' checkbox.
Enable the 'Free shipping' checkbox in the shipping or delivery filter section.
Set the rating filter to show only products with a minimum rating of 4 stars.
Open the sort dropdown above the product results and select 'Customer Rating - High to Low'.
Click on the first product card in the filtered list, set the quantity field to '3', and click the 'Add to cart' button.
Use the breadcrumb or back button to return to the filtered cleaning products list.
Click on the second product card in the list, set the quantity field to '2', and click the 'Add to cart' button.

tasks.name: Use quick order by SKU to add 50 units of a network switch and proceed to the order summary
tasks.description: Use the quick order by SKU feature to add 50 units of the network switch with SKU 'SW-1000' to the cart, then move through checkout until you reach the order summary page with invoice payment selected.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the header, click the 'Quick Order' or 'Bulk Order by SKU' link.
In the first SKU input field on the quick order page, type 'SW-1000'.
In the corresponding quantity field next to that SKU, type '50'.
Click the 'Add all to cart' or 'Add to cart' button on the quick order page.
Click the cart icon in the header to open the cart page.
On the cart page, click the 'Proceed to checkout' button.
On the checkout page, select the 'Business customer - pay by invoice' payment option radio button.
Click the 'Continue to order summary' button to reach the order summary page.

tasks.name: Schedule a demo for the 'Enterprise Analytics Suite' for a specific date and time
tasks.description: Navigate to the analytics software section, open the 'Enterprise Analytics Suite' product, and use its demo request form to schedule a demo on April 15, 2026 at 10:00 AM for 5 attendees.
steps: Navigate to the website homepage.
In the main navigation, hover over 'Software Solutions' and click on 'Analytics'.
On the analytics category page, scroll if necessary and click on the product card titled 'Enterprise Analytics Suite'.
On the product detail page, click the 'Schedule a demo' or 'Request demo' button.
In the demo request form, type 'Jordan Lee' into the 'Full name' field.
Type 'jordan.lee@example.com' into the 'Work email' field.
Open the 'Preferred date' date picker and select April 15, 2026.
Open the 'Preferred time' dropdown and select '10:00 AM'.
In the 'Number of attendees' field, enter '5'.
Click the 'Submit demo request' button at the bottom of the form.

entities.name: Category

fields.name: parent_category_code
fields.description: Optional parent category to support hierarchy (e.g., office_chairs under furniture)

fields.name: url
fields.description: Relative URL such as category.html?categoryId=office_chairs

entities.description: Navigation and catalog categories corresponding to site sections and subcategories

entities.name: Product

fields.name: category_code
fields.description: Primary category used for navigation and filtering

fields.name: rating_average
fields.description: Average customer rating, e.g., 4.5

fields.name: rating_count
fields.description: Number of ratings used to compute average

fields.name: color_options
fields.description: Array of available color names, e.g., ['Black','Gray']

fields.name: is_eco_certified
fields.description: True for eco-certified / environmentally friendly products

fields.name: has_free_shipping
fields.description: True if the product is eligible for free shipping

fields.name: shipping_method_codes
fields.description: Array of shipping method codes available for this product, e.g., ['standard_shipping_3_5_business_days']

fields.name: is_ergonomic
fields.description: Convenience flag for ergonomic chair filtering

fields.name: is_color_printing
fields.description: True if printer supports color printing

fields.name: screen_size_inches
fields.description: For monitors, e.g., 27

fields.name: resolution_width
fields.description: Horizontal resolution, e.g., 2560

fields.name: resolution_height
fields.description: Vertical resolution, e.g., 1440

fields.name: compatible_models
fields.description: Array of compatible device model strings, e.g., ['ProBook 450']

fields.name: is_comparable
fields.description: True if product can be added to comparison tables

fields.name: search_keywords
fields.description: Additional keywords to help search, e.g., ['color laser printer']

entities.description: Products in the corporate catalog including chairs, printers, paper, monitors, cleaning supplies, docking stations, software, and network switches

entities.name: Cart

fields.name: item_ids
fields.description: Array of CartItem ids in this cart

entities.description: Shopping cart (single active cart for the agent) containing items to purchase

entities.name: CartItem

fields.name: cart_id
fields.description: Id of associated Cart

fields.name: product_id

fields.name: product_name_snapshot

fields.name: sku_snapshot
fields.description: SKU captured at time of add-to-cart

fields.name: unit_price_snapshot
fields.description: Unit price at time of add-to-cart

fields.name: selected_color
fields.description: Chosen color option such as 'Black'

fields.name: shipping_method_code
fields.description: Selected shipping option for this line if applicable

fields.name: line_subtotal
fields.description: Computed as unit_price_snapshot * quantity

entities.description: Individual line items in the shopping cart, including product options and quantities

entities.name: SavedItem

fields.name: product_id
fields.description: Id of the saved Product

fields.name: selected_color
fields.description: Chosen color variant when saving, e.g., Black

entities.description: Wishlist-style saved items list used on the Saved Items page

entities.name: ProductComparison

fields.name: product_ids
fields.description: Array of Product ids selected for comparison (e.g., two 27-inch monitors)

entities.description: Temporary comparison sets for displaying products side-by-side on the compare page

entities.name: QuoteRequest

fields.name: product_id
fields.description: Id of the Product for which the quote is requested

fields.name: product_name_snapshot
fields.description: Product name at time of quote request

fields.name: customer_name

fields.name: company
fields.description: Company field, e.g., 'Acme Corp'

fields.name: comments
fields.description: Optional comments or additional requirements

entities.description: Quote requests submitted from eligible product detail pages such as printers

entities.name: DemoRequest

fields.name: product_id
fields.description: Id of the software Product for which a demo is requested

fields.name: product_name_snapshot
fields.description: Product name at time of demo request, e.g., 'Enterprise Analytics Suite'

fields.name: full_name
fields.description: Full name from the demo request form, e.g., 'Jordan Lee'

fields.name: preferred_date
fields.description: Preferred demo date (date portion used, e.g., 2026-04-15)

fields.name: preferred_time_slot

entities.name: CheckoutSession

fields.name: cart_id

fields.name: payment_method

entities.description: Current checkout state capturing the selected payment method for use on the Order Summary page
